title: Report quality
description: Checks whether the structured report is useful and grounded.

checks.title: Grounded summary
checks.question: Is the summary grounded in the product brief?
checks.description: The summary should use facts from the case instead of inventing unrelated claims.

checks.title: Actionable risks
checks.question: Are the risks concrete enough to guide a prompt change?
checks.description: Risks should be specific rather than generic.
